---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who does it help?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references, or anything else relevant.
